question: What are the design and operating ranges for pressure and temperature for the equipment 362-V001?

evaluation_criteria.notes: Answer was acceptable in prior evaluation. Should provide numeric values for pressure and temperature ranges.

question: List down all valves that need to be closed to isolate the equipment 362-V001. If possible, highlight all these valves on the P&ID with yellow colour. Mention any piping connections where there is no valve found for isolation purposes.

evaluation_criteria.notes: HV0004, HV0006, HV0016 correctly identified before. HV0091 and HV0092 were missed. HV0061 and HV0029 do not exist on this P&ID — hallucinated. BDV001 and PV0002 are not isolation valves and should not be listed.

question: When the valve EZV-002 closes suddenly during normal operation, which equipment upstream or downstream will see an increase in pressure. Additionally, is there a security, like a pressure safety valve or a high pressure alarm/trip for that high pressure to safeguard the equipment and piping from the high pressure?

tag_resolution_check.notes: Earlier version said EZV-0002 does not exist and answered for EZV-0001 instead. The system must correctly resolve EZV-002 to EZV-0002 (zero-padded) and answer about that valve, not redirect to EZV-0001.

evaluation_criteria.notes: Tag normalisation bug: EZV-002 should resolve to EZV-0002. Answer should not substitute EZV-0001.

question: If the hand valve HV0027 on equipment 362-V001 is inadvertently closed, which instrumentation is critical to give alarms or trip the process before the liquid enters the piping going to the fuel gas treatment package?

evaluation_criteria.notes: Core answer was correct. However earlier version incorrectly mentioned EZV-0001 in additional commentary — it should reference EZV-0002 if any EZV is mentioned at all.

question: List down all instrumentation on P&ID 100478CP-N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0008-001 in a tabular form that have a HH, H, L or LL function.

evaluation_criteria.notes: Examiner spot-checked and found this acceptable. Should present results as a table with tag, function type (HH/H/L/LL) and service.

question: Are there any locked closed or locked open valves on this P&ID? If yes, list them down and mention locked open and locked closed against each.

evaluation_criteria.notes: Earlier answer was very incomplete. Must include HV0011 (LO), HV0012 (LO), HV0013 (LO), HV0018 (LC) at minimum. Full list should be verified against graph normal_position field.

question: What is the purpose of BDZV0001? What happens if this is stuck open or stuck closed?

evaluation_criteria.notes: Answer was acceptable in prior evaluation.

question: Give me the list of spectacle blinds along with size of each.

evaluation_criteria.notes: Earlier answer was incorrect. Spectacle blinds exist on at least HV0027 and HV0050. Answer must list blinds with their sizes.

question: Note 10 is applicable on which Line#?

evaluation_criteria.notes: Answer was acceptable in prior evaluation. Should identify the specific line number(s) where Note 10 applies.

question: How many spec breaks exist on this P&ID? List them down along with the equipment acting as the boundary of the spec.

evaluation_criteria.notes: Earlier answer was incomplete. Must include spec break from CO1N9 to B01M8 at boundary of HV0004 and HV0031.
